zh.lifeSummary: 當Adela van Leuven於1030年出生在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯時，她的父親Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel33歲，母親Oda de Verdun42歲。她和Lambert II van Wanghe至少有1個兒子。她去世於1083年在德國賀林根阿爾騰包格 藍德阿爾騰包格享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adela van Leuven于1030年出生在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯时，她的父亲Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel33岁，母亲Oda de Verdun42岁。她和Lambert II van Wanghe至少有1个儿子。她去世于1083年在德国賀林根阿爾騰包格 藍德阿爾騰包格享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Leuven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerd, Inge, Merwin, Wilhelm.
North German: from the ancient Germanic personal name represented by Old English Lēofwine, composed of the elements lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + wine ‘friend’.

variants.name: Levens
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so named from the Old English personal name Lēofa (genitive form) + næss ‘promontory’.
North German, Dutch, and Flemish: patronymic from   Leven   2.

variants.name: Levin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Moshe, Aron, Emanuel, Yakov, Hyman, Isadore, Doron, Batya.
Jewish (mainly from Lithuania and Belarus): variant of Levy , formed with the Slavic possesive suffix -in in place of the original ending.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name Levin (see 4 below). As a Jewish name it sometimes represents a pet form of western Yiddish ‘lion’ (compare Lowe 3).

nameMeanings.name: Adela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

variants.name: Adella
meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Adela van Leuven was born in 1030, in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, her father, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, was 33 and her mother, Oda de Verdun, was 42. She had at least 1 son with Lambert II van Wanghe. She died in 1083, in Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adela van Leuven est née en 1030, à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Oda de Verdun, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lambert II van Wanghe. Elle est décédée en 1083, à Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adela van Leuven 1030 in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel 33 und ihre Mutter Oda de Verdun 42. Sie hatte mit Lambert II van Wanghe mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1083 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adela van Leuven è nata il nel 1030 nel Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Oda de Verdun, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lambert II van Wanghe. Morì nel 1083, nel Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Germania, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adela van Leuvenが1030年にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼで生まれた時，父Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brusselは33歳，母Oda de Verdunは42歳であった。彼女はLambert II van Wangheとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1083年にドイツスuリンジェンアルテンブルジャー ランドアルテンブルグで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adela van Leuven(이)가 1030년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Oda de Verdun(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Lambert II van Wanghe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1083년 독일 스u링 알텐버거 랜드 알텐버그에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adela van Leuven nasceu em 1030, em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Oda de Verdun, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lambert II van Wanghe. Ela faleceu em 1083, em Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Alemanha, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adela van Leuven родилась в 1030 г. в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Oda de Verdun, 42. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lambert II van Wanghe. Она умерла в 1083 г. в местности алтенбург, алтенбургир ланд, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adela van Leuven nació en 1030, en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Oda de Verdun, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Lambert II van Wanghe. Murió en 1083, en Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Alemania, a la edad de 53 años.
